name: Moonlit Carnage
short_description: Moonlit Carnage is a fast-paced bullet heaven survival game where you battle endless hordes of zombies in short, action-packed matches. Slay the undead, collect souls to level up, and choose powerful upgrades to push your survival to the limit. How long can you last before the horde overwhelms you?
detailed_description:
Moonlit Carnage

A relentless zombie horde. A city consumed by darkness. A lone survivor standing against impossible odds. How long can you last?

Bullet Heaven, Zombie Hell

Moonlit Carnage is a fast-paced, action-packed bullet heaven survival game where the undead are endless, and time is against you. Pick your character, grab your weapon, and dive into the chaos as you mow down hordes of zombies in ever-shrinking time limits.

The Gameplay Loop That Keeps You Hooked:

  • Pick Your Loadout – Choose from an arsenal of weapons and survivors, each with their own playstyle.

  • Choose Your Map – Battle through eerie streets, overgrown fields, and abandoned cityscapes, each offering unique challenges.

  • Slay and Upgrade – Kill zombies to collect their souls, level up, and choose from a variety of game-changing abilities.

  • Beat Your Own Record – The clock is ticking, and every second counts. Kill faster to extend your survival!

Low Stakes, High Thrills

Designed for short bursts of fun, Moonlit Carnage delivers satisfying, arcade-style action with no unnecessary complexity. Jump in, blast some zombies, and see how long you can last before the horde overwhelms you!

Features:

🧟 Endless waves of zombies, growing faster and deadlier over time.
🔫 Randomized ability upgrades – craft the ultimate build on the fly.
🌆 Multiple maps with distinct layouts and hazards.
🎮 Simple, responsive controls that keep the action flowing.
💀 Stylish low-poly visuals with a haunting atmosphere.

Are you ready to take on the undead and chase the ultimate high score? The horde is waiting…
